# fixtures/

Shared fixtures used by both v0 and v2 test packages.

## Contents

| Directory | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `timezones/` | Timezone offset data used by `test_systems_0.py` schema validation |

These fixtures are consumed by `_evohome` (the common package) tests only.
System-specific data lives in `fixtures_v0/` and `fixtures_v2/`.
